title: Customizable Player Models Simple Voice Chat compat
description: Adds compatibility between Customizable Player Models and Simple Voice Chat
body:
Adds speaking animation integration between [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models) and [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat).

Enables playing the 'Speaking' animation on Customizable Player Models models, while using Simple Voice Chat.

The Animation frame depends on sound volume of the player.

Works with Forge and Fabric.
